summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new features: Item Groups, Stamp Detail, and Seasonal Item Buffers. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified for all 3 features with successful end-to-end flow testing.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Item Groups - CRUD endpoints working correctly with auth validation
✓ Item group members must be >= 2, validated in both backend and frontend
✓ Stamp Detail endpoint returns items, stock, and assignment info correctly
✓ Clickable stamps in StampAssignments navigate to /stamp/{stampName}
✓ Categorize endpoint returns seasonal info: current_season, season_boost, years_analyzed
✓ Group badge (purple) displays correctly for grouped items in Item Buffers page
✓ Hindu calendar seasons used for velocity calculation with historical data
seed_data_creation: Test groups created and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features are fully functional. Item Groups uses item_groups collection with group_name and members array. Stamp Detail pulls from master_items by stamp and joins with inventory. Categorize uses HINDU_CALENDAR_SEASONS and historical_transactions for seasonal velocity. Frontend uses data-testid attributes throughout for testing.

Feature 1 - Item Groups.GET /api/item-groups: PASSED - Returns groups list with mapped_items
Feature 1 - Item Groups.POST /api/item-groups: PASSED - Creates group with auth validation (min 2 members)
Feature 1 - Item Groups.GET /api/item-groups/suggestions: PASSED - Returns master items and already_grouped list
Feature 1 - Item Groups.Frontend /item-groups page: PASSED - Shows empty state, New Group button, create dialog works
Feature 1 - Item Groups.UI Flow - Create Group: PASSED - Select items > Pick leader > Save creates group

Feature 2 - Stamp Detail.GET /api/stamps/{stamp_name}/detail: PASSED - Returns items, total_items, total_net_wt_kg, assigned_user
Feature 2 - Stamp Detail.Frontend /stamp-assignments: PASSED - Shows stamps table with clickable stamp names
Feature 2 - Stamp Detail.Frontend /stamp/{stampName}: PASSED - Shows items table, stock summary, executive assignment
Feature 2 - Stamp Detail.Navigation flow: PASSED - Click stamp in assignments table navigates to detail page

Feature 3 - Seasonal Item Buffers.POST /api/item-buffers/categorize: PASSED - Returns current_season, season_boost, years_analyzed, total_items
Feature 3 - Seasonal Item Buffers.Seasonal info example: Season: off_season (1x boost), 3 years analyzed, 794 items categorized
Feature 3 - Seasonal Item Buffers.Frontend /item-buffers: PASSED - Shows Re-Categorize button, status counts, Group badges
Feature 3 - Seasonal Item Buffers.Group merging: PASSED - Item groups merged during categorization
